title: 'Historic MoU Signed for Oil & Gas Exploration Along Assam-Nagaland Border': Amit Shah
description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah announced the development after addressing the 11th meeting of the Governing Council of NITI Aayog, chaired by PM Narendra Modi. Shah described the agreement as a “historic moment” that would be recorded in history for advancing the vision of a prosperous Northeast.
